MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Erik P. Weiss, Esq., for defendant and moving party: WPX Courier, LLC. and Rapid Delivery Solutions, LLC.

No other appearance. Proof of service of motion on the third party witness was provided to the court.
Defendants WPX Courier LLC And WPX Delivery Solutions' motion to compel witness Harry Rotz to comply with deposition subpoena for personal appearance and for records is granted on the following terms and conditions:
